comment: Two-file key mismatch fixture B. Pair with two-files-mismatch-A.json. Differences vs A: missing user.logout, user.settings; extra user.register, billing.*; loading -> 加载中... (high_similarity vs A's 加载中); errors.timeout zh same but en will differ if both are loaded against same zh; nested key dimension differs for app.title (string vs object).
